metadata.title: FixResult — outcome of applying a single fix

description: The outcome of applying one autonomous fix (src/body/self_healing/remediation_models.py). FixResult is the smallest result unit in the self-healing pipeline. It shares the ok-bool nucleus with ActionResult, ComponentResult, ValidationResult, and others — part of the result-shape family identified in the Wave 2 audit. The ok-nucleus reconciliation is a separate ADR candidate and does not block this contract. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.

ok.description: True if the fix was applied successfully.

error_message.description: Human-readable failure reason (str | None). Non-null when ok=False.

changes_made.description: Structured description of changes applied (dict[str, Any] | None). Non-null when ok=True and changes were made.
